name: pyxis
description: Pyxis — C++23 USD-native real-time path tracer (NVRHI/Vulkan, Slang). Plan §4 / §49.
$plan-references: §4 third-party dependency table (canonical justification per dep)
§33.10 spdlog SHARED linkage rule (Tracy follows the same rule)
§49 single-source-of-truth versioning (this file's builtin-baseline + _cmake/Thirdparty.cmake's GIT_TAG SHAs are reviewed together)
$builtin-baseline-comment: Pinned baseline of the Microsoft/vcpkg registry — this is what reproduces a build (§49).
Bumping this is reviewed alongside _cmake/Thirdparty.cmake. CI's _tools/check_pins.py asserts both files move together.

dependencies.name: spdlog
dependencies.$comment: Logging. Linked SHARED via the x64-windows-pyxis triplet — see plan §33.10.

dependencies.name: fmt
dependencies.$comment: Required by spdlog when external-fmt is on; pinned to keep ABI stable across DLLs.

dependencies.name: gtest
dependencies.$comment: Unit tests (pyxis_unit_tests). Not shipped in release. Plan §4.

dependencies.name: nlohmann-json
dependencies.$comment: parameters.json parsing + JSON profiling output. Plan §4 / §21.

dependencies.name: stb
dependencies.$comment: stb_image / stb_image_write — LDR decode + PNG output. Plan §4.

dependencies.name: mikktspace
dependencies.$comment: Tangent-space generation for normal maps. Plan §4 / §14.

dependencies.name: hlslpp
dependencies.$comment: HLSL-shaped C++ math types — appears in pyxis_renderer/Public/. Plan §4 / §23.

dependencies.name: tracy
dependencies.$comment: CPU/GPU profiling. Linked SHARED via the x64-windows-pyxis triplet (§33.10). Pin same minor as the server (§4).

dependencies.name: concurrentqueue
dependencies.$comment: moodycamel MPMC lock-free queue — ingest→render thread mutation queue. Plan §4 / §31 / §18.5.

dependencies.name: flecs
dependencies.$comment: ECS for SceneWorld. Linked PRIVATE into pyxis_renderer; no Flecs header escapes Public/. Plan §4 / §8 / §30.11.

debug-tools.description: Enables Flecs Explorer (REST UI on http://localhost:27750) gated behind PYXIS_DEBUG_TOOLS — Debug builds only. Plan §4 / §30.11.
